proj_002.name: Next.js Migration
proj_002.scope: Migrate the frontend portal from Pages router to React Server Components.
proj_002.requirements: Convert old components, check middleware, and test caching layer integration.

proj_001.name: Playwright Automation
proj_001.scope: Automate all QA workflows and regress validation suites.
proj_001.requirements: Verify login, task creation, status updates, and sheet sync operations.

task_001.title: Configure Firebase Auth Router
task_001.notes: Verify authorization callbacks and JWT validation inside NextAuth route

task_002.title: Implement seed script
task_002.notes: Must handle nested structures, batch transactions, and support clean re-runs

task_003.title: Review Pull Request for Seeding Automation
task_003.notes: Ensure that safety controls and idempotency are strictly preserved

status_001.work_done: Configured standard Next.js route handlers with Firebase Admin SDK
status_001.planned_work: Integrate seed automation and run verification tests

status_002.work_done: Created complete Firestore schema mapping and validated composite index configurations
status_002.planned_work: Deploy production firestore.rules and conduct automated test coverage validations
status_002.blockers: Minor delay in service account credentials access
